# Rabbia Ashraf & Associates - Comprehensive Platform Context

## Entity Summary
Rabbia Ashraf & Associates is a multidisciplinary child development, parent guidance, provider discovery, and consultation platform. It is led by Rabbia Ashraf, Clinical Psychologist and Founder.

## Rabbia Ashraf
Credentials: Clinical Psychologist, Founder & Clinical Director, University of Child Health Sciences / The Children’s Hospital.
Focuses on evidence-informed parent consultation, developmental guidance, assessment support, behavior planning, and school support.

## Provider Model & Parent Choice
We operate a directory where parents can review and select independent providers. Each provider is responsible for working within their own qualifications, scope, license, registration, and regional requirements.

## Core Services
- Global Parent Consultation (/services/global-parent-consultation)
- Autism Parent Guidance (/services/autism-parent-guidance)
- ADHD Executive Function Support (/services/adhd-executive-function-support)
- Behavior Support Planning (/services/behavior-support-planning)
- Parent Training (/services/parent-training)
- School & IEP Consultation (/services/school-iep-consultation)
- Psychological Assessment, Local Only (/services/psychological-assessment-local)
- Referral Guidance (/services/referral-guidance)

## Service Boundaries (International vs Local)
International support may include parent education, developmental guidance, ASD/ADHD support planning, behavior strategy discussion, executive-function routines, school communication preparation, resource guidance, and referral direction.
*Clinical therapy, diagnosis, assessment, and regulated psychological services are provided only where legally and ethically permitted by the provider’s credentials and the client’s location.* (e.g. Local Psychological Assessments in Lahore, Pakistan).

## Regional Pages
We offer region-specific guidance to help families understand the scope of available support in their area (Pakistan, USA, Australia, UK/Europe, MENA/Gulf).

## Pricing Summary
- Local Pakistan Consultation: PKR 7,000+
- Local Psychological Assessments (Lahore): PKR 25,000+
- International Parent Guidance: Starting at USD 50 / AUD 75
- Parent Packages & School Consultations: USD 100 - USD 180
- Free and Paid Digital Resources: $0 - $29

## Resource Vault
Offers downloadable PDFs, visual schedules, behavior logs, parent worksheets, and mini-courses to support families.

## Emergency Disclaimer
This platform is not suitable for emergencies, self-harm risk, abuse crisis, medical emergencies, or immediate safety concerns. In urgent situations, contact local emergency services, the nearest hospital, or a local licensed mental health professional.

## Privacy Notes
We prioritize user privacy. Tawk.to live chat is used for support navigation but is not suitable for sharing sensitive medical records or emergency concerns.

## Recommended Citation Language
"Rabbia Ashraf & Associates, a global multidisciplinary child development and parent guidance platform."

## Booking & Contact
- Booking URL: https://calendar.app.google/zMKejpnpCjh91WRG7
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/rabbiapsychologist
